generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've lived in this neighborhood for 40 years, and let me tell you, the only way our community stays strong is if everyone embraces our values. We've seen what happens when people don't integrate - it's not about being unwelcoming, it's about preserving what makes our town special. My grandfather built this place with his own hands, and I won't let it change beyond recognition. We need policies that encourage newcomers to adopt our way of life, not the other way around. That's how we maintain order and keep our streets safe.
